# CodeAgentLens Release Checklist

- release_owner: milome
- first_tag: v1.0.0
- github_owner: milome
- origin_url: https://github.com/milome/code-agent-lens.git
- security_contact: GitHub private vulnerability reporting: https://github.com/milome/code-agent-lens/security/advisories/new
- backup: deferred
- terminal-launcher: deferred
- updater: disabled_until_new_repository_release_flow_verified
- legacy_code_agent_lens_keys: retained_only_for_runtime_compatibility_when_code_requires_existing_env_names
- synthetic_trace_gate: source_fixture_driven
- gitleaks_allowlist_count: 0
- npm_audit_disposition: pending
- sbom: pending
- public_surface_scan: pending
- docker_full_chain: pending
